_comment: Claude Code project settings — hooks wiring for job-automation
_learning: This file tells Claude Code what to do automatically after certain events. PostToolUse hooks fire after Claude successfully uses a tool. UserPromptSubmit hooks fire when you type a message. See hooks/on_job_approved.md and hooks/on_email_received.md for full documentation.

PostToolUse._comment: After writing job_tracker.json (e.g. after sheets_sync pull), check for newly approved jobs

hooks.command: Read hooks/on_job_approved.md and check data/job_tracker.json for entries where status=Approved AND career_page_url is not null AND resume_path is null. If any found, confirm with user then invoke agents/application_prep.md for each.

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Natural language trigger for email check

hooks.command: Read hooks/on_email_received.md and run the email check pipeline: search Gmail for unprocessed job emails, classify them, invoke agents/tracker.md for each, label processed emails.

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Natural language trigger for job scout

hooks.command: Read agents/job_scout.md and run a full job scout: scrape LinkedIn via Apify, enrich, score, write shortlisted jobs to tracker, push to Google Sheets.
